step_rationale: Post-MI inflammation attenuation; specialized pro-resolving mediator of lipid inflammation.
mechanism: 12-HEPE attenuates post-MI inflammation and promotes resolution of plaque inflammation through lipid mediator signaling.

references.title: Morchella polysaccharide ameliorates myocardial infarction inflammation in mice through increasing gut microbiota-derived 12-HEPE.
